evidences.title: NFL playoff schedule 2026: Updated bracket & TV ...
evidences.content: It was a widely differing path to conference championship weekend for the Seattle Seahawks, Denver Broncos, New England Patriots and Los Angeles Rams. While the two No. 1 seeds were alive, Seattle's path had been about defensive dominance, while Denver's season took an unexpected turn when Bo Nix was ruled out for the season after a divisional-round win over the Bills. Meanwhile, the Patriots relied on their hard-nosed defense and Drake Maye's blossom into stardom to return to the AFC Championship Game, while the Rams snuck by in both of their two playoff wins, seeking a second Super Bowl in five years. Now, the AFC and NFC champions have been crowned, with the Patriots and Seahawks advancing to Super Bowl 60. [...] New England took down the Broncos in Denver on Sunday afternoon in some snow, not needing much offensively to claim a 10-7 victory in the AFC Championship Game. Drake Maye is heading to the Super Bowl in his second NFL season, while Mike Vrabel has guided New England back to the Super Bowl in his first season as head coach. Meanwhile, the Seahawks are heading to the Super Bowl behind Sam Darnold's excellent play at quarterback and an elite defense. Seattle took down...

Jarrett Stidham will replace Bo Nix, who was lost for the season on an ankle injury sustained late in Denver's win over Buffalo. evidences.title: 2025-26 NFL Playoff Bracket - Super Bowl Matchup & Kickoff Time
evidences.content: The top seven seeds in the NFC made the playoffs. The Seahawks finished as the #1 seed in the NFC and get a bye through Wild Card Weekend, while also gaining homefield advantage. Seattle finished at 14-3, winning two more games than any other team in the NFC. The Bears earned the #2 seed thanks to holding the head-to-head tiebreaker over the Eagles, as both teams finished at 11-6. The Panthers, surprisingly, won the NFC South and got the #4 seed. The most notable teams not in the playoffs from the NFC are the Lions, who were the top seed in the NFC last year, the Commanders, who were the NFC runner-up last year, and the Buccaneers, who had made the playoffs in each of the last five seasons. [...] Updated 2026 NFL Playoff Bracket ahead of Super Bowl 60 The 2025-26 NFL regular season kicked off on Thursday, September 4, 2025. The regular season will conclude after all Week 18 games are played on January 4, 2026. The 2026 NFL playoffs are scheduled to begin January 10 with Super Wildcard Weekend. The 2026 Super Bowl will be played Sunday, February 8, 2026. The image above – which will be updated after each game of the 2025-26 regular season – displays the NFL playoff bracket ahead...

evidences.title: 2026 New York Giants season - Wikipedia
evidences.content: The 2026 season will be the New York Giants' 102nd in the National Football League (NFL), their fifth under general manager "General manager (American football)") Joe Schoen and their first season under head coach John Harbaugh. Harbaugh spent the previous 18 seasons with the Baltimore Ravens. They will seek to improve upon their 2025 record of 4–13, make the playoffs after a three-year absence, end their 14-year NFC East title drought, which is currently the longest active drought in the NFC, and put an end to three consecutive seasons with fewer than seven wins. ## Offseason ### Coaching changes [...] | Rivalries | Chicago Bears Dallas Cowboys Green Bay Packers New England Patriots New York Jets Philadelphia Eagles San Francisco 49ers Washington Commanders | | Key personnel | Owners: John Mara & Steve Tisch General manager: Joe Schoen Head coach: John Harbaugh | | Division championships (22) | 1933 1934 1935 1938 1939 1941 1944 1946 1956 1958 1959 1961 1962 1963 1986 1989 1990 1997 2000 2005 2008 2011 | | Conference championships (11) | 1956 1958 1959 1961 1962 1963 1986 1990 2000 2007 2011 | | League championships (8) | 1927 1934 1938 1956 1986 (XXI) 1990 (XXV) 2007 (XLII) 20...

evidences.title: The NFL in the 1970s - Facebook
evidences.content: ## The NFL in the 1970s's Post ### The NFL in the 1970s 1d · More Than a Hundred Years Old! The New York Giants will be celebrating their 102-year anniversary in 2026. That is quite an accomplishment, and they have quite a legacy. True, the 1970s did not produce a lot of great memories for the team. But they did produce some. What were some of the great Giants memories of the 1970s? To me, November 8, 1970, produced a memorable event for the Giants. On that day, they defeated their NFC East Division rivals, the Dallas Cowboys at Yankee Stadium by a score of 23-20. It marked their fifth straight victory in a season where the Giants finished with a 9-5 record. [...] Jimmy Mitchell 101. To be clear, the Giants will play their 102nd SEASON in 2026. They started playing on 1925. 1926 would be their first anniversary. 2026 is the 101st anniversary 15h [...] Top fan Michael Heyman If the Giants had beat the Rams in the final week of the season, they would have won the NFC East. The Cowboys & Lions would have had a coin flip to determine the wild card spot, because they hadn't yet implemented any modern tiebreaker rules. 21h 5

evidences.title: Seahawks 31-27 Rams (Jan 25, 2026) Game Recap - ESPN
evidences.content: Darnold threw for three touchdowns, the Seahawks' “Dark Side” defense came up with a critical fourth-down stop, and Seattle advanced to the Super Bowl, beating the Los Angeles Rams 31-27 in an electrifying NFC championship game on Sunday. “You can’t talk about the game without talking about our quarterback,” second-year coach Mike Macdonald said. “He shut a lot of people up tonight, so I’m happy for him.” Led by Darnold — an eight-year veteran playing for his fifth team — the Seahawks (16-3) reached their fourth Super Bowl in franchise history and first in 11 years. Seattle lost that most recent appearance to New England, its opponent in two weeks at Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara, California.
